holdings.infoBox: SSCP is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lincoln Educational Services stock at 6.93%, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. at 6.65%, The Pennant Group at 5.87%, Innovative Aerosystems at 5.07%, and China Yuchai International at 4.74%.

overview.description: The SMART Small Cap ETF (SSCP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund provides exposure to small-cap US companies. The actively managed fund uses a multi-step process that identifies securities exhibiting strong momentum and revenue growth. SSCP was launched on May 11, 2026 and is issued by Smart.
